---
filters:
  - inline.lua
format: 
  typst:
    include-in-header: style.typ
    include-before-body: layout.typ
    font-paths: ["assets/fonts"]
    papersize: a4
    number-sections: false
    toc: false
    highlight-style: tango
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: right
    page-layout: article
    format-links: false
    other-links:
      - text: PDF
        href: index.pdf
        icon: file-pdf 
    theme: 
      light: minimal
      dark: darkly
    css: styles.css
    csl: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/citation-style-language/styles/master/ieee.csl
    bibliography: references.bib
    highlight-style:
      light: tango 
      dark: dracula
title-block-style: none
link-citations: true
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="typst"}
```{=typst}
// The Title & Subtitle (Styled as raw text, invisible to the TOC)
#text(size: 16pt, weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#555555"))[Next-Generation Infrastructure for Foundation Models]
#v(0.5em)
#text(size: 12pt, weight: "bold", fill: rgb("#777777"))[A Framework for Decentralized Learning with Heterogeneous Compute]

#v(1em) 

// The Author Block
#grid(
  columns: 2,
  align: horizon,
  gutter: 0.6em, 
  box(
    fill: luma(240), 
    inset: (x: 10pt, y: 5pt), 
    radius: 6pt, 
    link("mailto:mauricio.munoz@ai.se")[*Mauricio Muñoz*]
  ),
  [Senior Research Engineer & Project Lead, AI Sweden | March 2026]
)

#v(1em) 
#line(length: 100%, stroke: 1.2pt + luma(200)) 
#v(1.0em)
```
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
```{=html}
<div style="margin-top: 1.2em; margin-bottom: 0.5em;">
  <div style="font-size: 1.6em; font-weight: bold; color: #555555; line-height: 1.2;">
    Next-Generation Infrastructure for Foundation Models
  </div>
  <div style="font-size: 1.2em; font-weight: bold; color: #777777; line-height: 1.2; margin-top: 1.5em;">
    A Framework for Decentralized Learning with Heterogeneous Compute
  </div>
</div>

<div style="margin-top: 2em;">
  <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6em; font-size: 0.95em;">
    <div style="background-color: #f0f0f0; padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 6px;">
      <a href="mailto:mauricio.munoz@ai.se" style="font-weight: bold; text-decoration: none; color: inherit;">Mauricio Muñoz</a>
    </div>
    <div style="color: #555;">
      Senior Research Engineer & Project Lead, AI Sweden | March 2026
    </div>
  </div>
  
  <div style="border-top: 1.5px solid #c8c8c8; margin-top: 1.2em; margin-bottom: 4em; width: 100%;"></div>
</div>
```
:::

## Executive Summary

{{< include _summary.qmd >}}

```{=typst}
// Injects the Table of Contents directly into this spot
#pagebreak()
#outline(title: "Table of Contents", depth: 2)
#pagebreak()
```

## 1. Introduction & Motivation

{{< include _introduction.qmd >}}

## 2. Project Partners

{{< include _partners.qmd >}}

## 3. Project Results Summary

{{< include _results.qmd >}}

## 4. The NextGen Framework (The Engineering Solution)

{{< include _nextgen.qmd >}}

## 5. Use-Case: RAG for Medical Leaflets (AstraZeneca)

{{< include _pharma_rag.qmd >}}

## 6. Conclusions

{{< include _conclusions.qmd >}}

## 7. Acknowledgements

{{< include _acknowledgements.qmd >}}

## 8. References

{{< include _references.qmd >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

## Appendix A: FL Strategies for Heterogeneous Compute 

{{< include _appendix_fl.qmd >}}
